query:
ALTER TABLE knowledge_documents 
ADD COLUMN source_system ENUM('google_drive', 'upload', 'xai_collection', 'manual') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'google_drive' AFTER source,
ADD COLUMN last_synced_at TIMESTAMP NULL AFTER adminNotes,
ADD COLUMN xai_collection_id VARCHAR(255) NULL AFTER last_synced_at,
ADD COLUMN synced_to_xai INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 AFTER xai_collection_id,
ADD COLUMN workspace_id INT NULL AFTER synced_to_xai;
